templates.name: Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1
templates.purpose: Canonical page-level Dashboard template for new Yeeflow Dashboard pages. Copy and normalize the export-shaped page shell, then select/remove/adapt sections from business requirements.
templates.relationshipToGoldenReferences: This page shell coexists with the Event Portfolio component Golden Reference. Event Portfolio header/filter/KPI/grid-table regions may be mapped into section_content_area regions without breaking the v1.1 page skeleton.

sectionSelectionRules.oneColumn: Use for wide, dense, tabular, or long-label content such as Collection grid/table sections.
sectionSelectionRules.twoOrThreeColumn: Use for short comparable cards with similar density and height.
sectionSelectionRules.sixtyForty: Use when one side is primary and the other is supporting context, summary, notes, actions, or status.
sectionSelectionRules.operations: Include Operations containers only when real configured actions exist; omit otherwise.

forbiddenGeneratedDashboardPatterns: dashboard-only upgrade mutation of non-dashboard resources

widthCompletion.rule: All template container nodes with missing attrs.style.widthtype are completed as Full width [null, "1"].

controlledSlotRules: Business text, bindings, filters, KPI values, FontAwesome icons, actions, and Collection/table fields may only change inside allowed business-content containers.
New dashboard layout modules may only be added by copying one of the allowed repeatable/removable modules.
Copied modules must preserve template structure, hierarchy, control types, width, padding, direction, gap, background, and required children.
Non-business template containers must remain structurally equivalent to the v1.1 template.
Operations containers must be omitted when no real actions exist.
Additional KPI cards must copy event_portfolio_kpi_planned_events and replace only allowed KPI business content.

templates.name: Workbench Dashboard Page Layout
templates.purpose: Second canonical page-level Dashboard template for operational workbench pages. Copy the export-shaped Workbench Dashboard shell, then remove, duplicate, reorder, or map approved modules according to business requirements while preserving locked layout/style regions.
templates.relationshipToGoldenReferences: This page shell coexists with Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 and all component-level golden references. Data Analytics and Collection templates may be placed inside approved Workbench business-content slots such as section_content_area and chart_cards_section without replacing the Workbench page skeleton.
whenToUse: Operational work queues, coordinator workbenches, triage pages, case or task command centers, and pages that benefit from primary work content plus optional right-side context.
Dashboards that need top page actions, top filter group, KPI cards, analytics cards, a large primary working area, and optional right-side supporting cards.
whenNotToUse: Simple overview dashboards where the general v1.1 section layout is clearer.
New/Edit data list forms, Approval forms, or pages where the right-side workbench model would create empty or decorative regions.

sectionSelectionRules.primaryWorkingArea: Use primary_working_area for the main work queue, large Collections, primary charts, and operational content.
sectionSelectionRules.rightSidePanel: Use right_side_panel for supporting KPIs, compact analytics, related context, alerts, and secondary cards. Remove the whole right_side_panel when it has no real business content.
sectionSelectionRules.chartCardsSection: Use chart_cards_section as the preferred host when multiple Data Analytics templates need to be displayed together. Keep no more than three analytics templates per chart_cards_section; add another chart_cards_section when more are needed. Remove chart_cards_section when no Data Analytics templates are materialized.
sectionSelectionRules.filters: Use dashboard_standard_filter_group for page-level filters. The top section_content_area may also host other real business controls when planned.
sectionSelectionRules.operations: Include Operations containers only when real configured actions exist; omit otherwise.
sectionSelectionRules.ordering: Approved Workbench modules may be reordered according to business priority, as long as the main workbench shell remains coherent.

forbiddenGeneratedDashboardPatterns: business controls directly under root content outside approved slots
dashboard-only upgrade mutation of non-dashboard resources
controlledSlotRules: Business text, bindings, filters, KPI values, FontAwesome icons, actions, Collection fields, and Data Analytics bindings may only change inside approved Workbench business-content containers.
New Workbench modules may only be added by copying approved repeatable/removable modules from this template.
Copied modules must preserve template structure, hierarchy, control types, width, padding, direction, gap, background, typography, and required children.
chart_cards_section is the preferred group host for multiple Data Analytics templates and may appear under primary_working_area or right_side_panel only.
right_side_panel is optional and must be removed when empty.
Operations containers must be omitted when no real actions exist.
Additional KPI cards must copy kpi_card_wrapper and replace only approved KPI business content.

templates.name: Two-Panel Workspace Dashboard Page Layout
templates.purpose: Outlook-style two-panel master-detail Dashboard page layout for managing one primary dataset with a left record list and a right current-record detail/work area.
templates.relationshipToGoldenReferences: This is a page-level Dashboard shell. Collection, Data table, Data Analytics, KPI, filter, and field-display golden references remain component-level modules inserted only into approved editable regions of this selected layout.
whenToUse: Use when a page focuses on one source dataset and users need to search/filter records in a left list while reviewing or managing the selected record on the right.
Good for service desks, projects, customer lists, document libraries, form reports, and data reports that need an Outlook-like list-and-detail workspace.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for broad executive overview/reporting dashboards with unrelated sections; use dashboard-page-layouts-v1.1 instead.
Do not use when the selected record requires a persistent extra right-side information panel; use the three-panel workspace layout instead.

sectionSelectionRules.leftPanel: Bind left_panel_data_items_wrapper to exactly one primary Data list, Document library, Form report, or Data report. Preserve the left panel shell, selection action, and selected-state behavior; map only source, filters, sort, display fields, and approved item content.
sectionSelectionRules.currentItemPanel: Bind current_item_wrapper to the same primary source as the left panel, set limit records to 1, and filter by ID equals temp variable vCurrentItemID so only the selected item is displayed.
sectionSelectionRules.filters: Use left_panel_filter_group for left list data filters with a maximum of two filters per group; add another left_panel_filter_group below it when more filters are required. Remove unused filter groups.
sectionSelectionRules.operations: Operations containers and operation buttons may exist only when real configured actions are planned. Remove no-action Operations containers and visual-only buttons.
sectionSelectionRules.fieldsGrid: Use current_item_fields_grid for selected-record fields. Use current_item_standard_field for concise values and current_item_large_field for multiple-line, rich-text, image, or file values; large fields must span the full grid column count on every breakpoint.
sectionSelectionRules.primaryWorkingArea: Use primary_working_area for related records, Data tables, Collections, KPI cards, Data Analytics, timelines, or other business content associated with the selected record.
sectionSelectionRules.chartCardsSection: Use chart_cards_section as the preferred host for grouped Data Analytics templates. Keep no more than three analytics templates per chart_cards_section; add another chart_cards_section when more are needed. Remove empty chart_cards_section containers.
sectionSelectionRules.ordering: Approved modules inside the current item work area may be reordered according to business priority; preserve the left-panel-to-current-item master-detail shell.

allowedBusinessMappingChanges: content_panel_empty may be edited to show the empty-selection state when vCurrentItemID has no selected record.
content_panel_empty_image may be replaced with a domain-appropriate empty-selection image while preserving Picture control style.
content_panel_empty_title and content_panel_empty_description may be rewritten with domain-specific empty-selection guidance.
forbiddenGeneratedDashboardPatterns: Do not modify template regions outside the approved business-content containers and repeatable modules.
Do not remove or rename vCurrentItemID, the left-panel selection action contract, or the current-item Collection filter contract.
Do not keep empty section_content_area, empty chart_cards_section, empty Operations, or title-only copied sections.
Do not create ad hoc master-detail shells or loose left/right panels outside this template; clone this registered template first.
Do not place unrelated overview-dashboard sections that are not scoped to the selected primary source or its related business data.
Do not keep left_panel_caption_add_button for Form report, Data report, or other read-only/reporting sources unless it is bound to a real create-capable Data list or Document library action.
controlledSlotRules: Business content may change only in registered editable containers and copied repeatable/removable modules for this selected workspace layout.

Preserve page root attrs, main shell, left_panel, content_panel, left panel selection behavior, page temp variables, and page form actions unless a field/action mapping explicitly targets an editable region.
left_panel_data_items_wrapper must show the primary source dataset and its item click/selection action must set vCurrentItemID.
current_item_wrapper must use the same source as the left panel, limit records to 1, and filter by the selected vCurrentItemID value.
left_panel_filter_group may contain at most two Data Filter controls; add more groups when needed and remove empty groups.
current_item_main_header_operations and all Operations containers must be omitted when there are no real configured actions.
current_item_main_header_operations_button and current_item_aditional_header_operations_button icons must use operation-appropriate FontAwesome icons and bind to concrete form actions.
current_item_fields_grid column counts and any current_item_large_field column spans must stay aligned across PC/laptop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints.
chart_cards_section is the preferred group host for multiple Data Analytics templates and must contain no more than three analytics templates.
Copied modules must preserve template hierarchy, control types, widths, padding, direction, gap, background, typography, temp variables, and form-action wiring outside approved business values.
left_panel_caption_add_button may be retained only for create-capable Data list or Document library sources; remove it for Form report, Data report, or other read-only/reporting sources.

templates.name: Three-Panel Workspace Dashboard Page Layout
templates.purpose: Outlook-style three-panel master-detail Dashboard page layout for managing one primary dataset with a left record list, a central current-record detail/work area, and an additional right-side information panel.
templates.relationshipToGoldenReferences: This is a page-level Dashboard shell. Collection, Data table, Data Analytics, KPI, filter, and field-display golden references remain component-level modules inserted only into approved editable regions of this selected layout.
whenToUse: Use when a page focuses on one source dataset and the selected record needs main details plus additional side information, related context, compact actions, or supporting cards.

Good for service desks, customer/account workspaces, projects with many related tasks/issues/activities, and other master-detail management pages where the selected item needs a secondary context panel.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for simple overview/reporting dashboards with unrelated sections; use dashboard-page-layouts-v1.1 instead.
Do not use when the selected record does not need a separate additional information panel; use the two-panel workspace layout instead.

sectionSelectionRules.leftPanel: Bind left_panel_data_items_wrapper to exactly one primary Data list, Document library, Form report, or Data report. Preserve the left panel shell, selection action, and selected-state behavior; map only source, filters, sort, display fields, and approved item content.
sectionSelectionRules.currentItemPanel: Bind current_item_wrapper to the same primary source as the left panel, set limit records to 1, and filter by ID equals temp variable vCurrentItemID so only the selected item is displayed.
sectionSelectionRules.filters: Use left_panel_filter_group for left list data filters with a maximum of two filters per group; add another left_panel_filter_group below it when more filters are required. Remove unused filter groups.
sectionSelectionRules.operations: Operations containers and operation buttons may exist only when real configured actions are planned. Remove no-action Operations containers and visual-only buttons.
sectionSelectionRules.fieldsGrid: Use current_item_fields_grid for selected-record fields. Use current_item_standard_field for concise values and current_item_large_field for multiple-line, rich-text, image, or file values; large fields must span the full grid column count on every breakpoint.
sectionSelectionRules.primaryWorkingArea: Use primary_working_area for related records, Data tables, Collections, KPI cards, Data Analytics, timelines, or other business content associated with the selected record.
sectionSelectionRules.chartCardsSection: Use chart_cards_section as the preferred host for grouped Data Analytics templates. Keep no more than three analytics templates per chart_cards_section; add another chart_cards_section when more are needed. Remove empty chart_cards_section containers.
sectionSelectionRules.ordering: Approved modules inside the current item work area may be reordered according to business priority; preserve the left-panel-to-current-item master-detail shell.
sectionSelectionRules.additionalPanel: Use the additional right panel only for selected-record side context, auxiliary actions, or related data that benefits from a separate panel. Remove unused copied modules inside it.

allowedBusinessMappingChanges: content_panel_empty may be edited to show the empty-selection state when vCurrentItemID has no selected record.
content_panel_empty_image may be replaced with a domain-appropriate empty-selection image while preserving Picture control style.
content_panel_empty_title and content_panel_empty_description may be rewritten with domain-specific empty-selection guidance.
forbiddenGeneratedDashboardPatterns: Do not modify template regions outside the approved business-content containers and repeatable modules.
Do not remove or rename vCurrentItemID, the left-panel selection action contract, or the current-item Collection filter contract.
Do not keep empty section_content_area, empty chart_cards_section, empty Operations, or title-only copied sections.
Do not create ad hoc master-detail shells or loose left/right panels outside this template; clone this registered template first.
Do not place unrelated overview-dashboard sections that are not scoped to the selected primary source or its related business data.
Do not keep left_panel_caption_add_button for Form report, Data report, or other read-only/reporting sources unless it is bound to a real create-capable Data list or Document library action.
controlledSlotRules: Business content may change only in registered editable containers and copied repeatable/removable modules for this selected workspace layout.

Preserve page root attrs, main shell, left_panel, content_panel, left panel selection behavior, page temp variables, and page form actions unless a field/action mapping explicitly targets an editable region.
left_panel_data_items_wrapper must show the primary source dataset and its item click/selection action must set vCurrentItemID.
current_item_wrapper must use the same source as the left panel, limit records to 1, and filter by the selected vCurrentItemID value.
left_panel_filter_group may contain at most two Data Filter controls; add more groups when needed and remove empty groups.
current_item_main_header_operations and all Operations containers must be omitted when there are no real configured actions.
current_item_main_header_operations_button and current_item_aditional_header_operations_button icons must use operation-appropriate FontAwesome icons and bind to concrete form actions.
current_item_fields_grid column counts and any current_item_large_field column spans must stay aligned across PC/laptop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints.
chart_cards_section is the preferred group host for multiple Data Analytics templates and must contain no more than three analytics templates.
Copied modules must preserve template hierarchy, control types, widths, padding, direction, gap, background, typography, temp variables, and form-action wiring outside approved business values.
left_panel_caption_add_button may be retained only for create-capable Data list or Document library sources; remove it for Form report, Data report, or other read-only/reporting sources.

selectionRules.dashboard-page-layouts-v1.1: Use for general overview, monitoring, reporting, and section-oriented dashboard pages.
selectionRules.dashboard-page-layouts-workbench: Use for operational workbench dashboards that need a primary working area, optional right-side context panel, filters, KPI cards, data analytics cards, and queue/list regions.
selectionRules.dashboard-page-layouts-two-panel-workspa: Use for an Outlook-style master-detail Dashboard focused on one primary source dataset, with a left record list and a right selected-record detail/work area.
selectionRules.dashboard-page-layouts-three-panel-works: Use for an Outlook-style master-detail Dashboard focused on one primary source dataset where the selected record needs both a central detail/work area and a separate right-side additional information panel.
